name: Keywords AI

auth.notes: KEYWORDSAI_API_KEY; also acts as OpenAI-compatible proxy endpoint

performance.notes: Proxy mode adds ~10-20ms; async logging available for zero-latency path

agent_readiness.notes: OpenAI-compatible proxy = zero code change for logging. Supports 200+ LLM providers. Built-in alerting, user analytics, cost tracking, prompt management.

gotchas: Proxy mode routes requests through Keywords AI servers (data leaves your infra)
Free tier limit hits quickly for production traffic
Prompt management UI less mature than LangSmith
best_when: Want drop-in logging with zero code changes (OpenAI proxy)
Need cost tracking and user attribution across 200+ LLM providers
Teams wanting unified observability + prompt management in one tool
Startups needing production LLM monitoring without ops overhead
avoid_when: Data sovereignty requirements prevent routing through third-party proxy
Already invested in LangSmith or Langfuse ecosystem
summary: Keywords AI is an LLM observability platform with an OpenAI-compatible proxy for zero-code-change logging. Supports 200+ LLM providers, tracks cost/latency/quality per user, and includes prompt management. The proxy approach is its killer feature — swap base_url and get instant logging. Downside: all traffic routes through their servers.
